series_metadata.series_description: The Training Course Information is composed of Memoranda, flyers, catalogues, registration forms, rosters, brown bag presentations, handouts, and other records relating to training courses run by various departments within the Infrastructure & Technology (IT) Division.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain until superseded, obsolete, or replaced, and then destroy. ; Paper: Retain until superseded, obsolete, or replaced, and then destroy., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Recycle
